expect.stable_default_identity: When CODEX_THREAD_ID is present, separate claim/release subprocesses should share one default owner identity without requiring --session.

actual.implementation: tools/claim.py now prefers SWARM_SESSION_ID, then CODEX_THREAD_ID, then pid fallback.

diff.surprise: No downstream caller changes were needed because task_order_helpers already imports get_session_id from claim.py.
diff.residual_risk: Non-Codex shells without SWARM_SESSION_ID or CODEX_THREAD_ID still fall back to pid-based ownership.
